subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Fath 2
subcodes.first_line: O Fath-i-A'zam! We have, verily, encompassed within thy being the triumph of Our Cause, and have breathed into thee a spirit from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فتح الاعظم انا قد احصینا فی نفسک نصر نفسنا الحق و نفخنا فیک روحا من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @law of pilgrimage, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @idolatry
